---
title: "Welcome to Afreen's Portfolio"
author: "Afreen Alam"
date: "05-21-2026"
---

## About Me

I am a data professional currently pursuing my Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University[cite: 1]. I bring over three years of industry experience across financial services, healthcare, and digital analytics[cite: 1]. My expertise spans building scalable Generative AI/RAG systems, deploying predictive machine learning architectures, and engineering end-to-end data pipelines that drive strategic business decisions[cite: 1]. 

---

## Technical Skills

*   **LLM & Generative AI:** LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, Reranker, OpenAI API, GitHub Models API, FAISS, RAGAS[cite: 1]
*   **Machine Learning Frameworks:** PyTorch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost[cite: 1]
*   **Programming Languages:** Python, SQL, R[cite: 1]
*   **Visualization Tools:** Tableau, Power BI, Plotly, Matplotlib, Google Analytics[cite: 1]

---

## Education

| Degree | Institution | Timeline |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **M.S. Applied Business Analytics** | Boston University | Expected Dec 2026[cite: 1] |
| **B.Sc. (Honours) Data Science and Analytics** | National University of Singapore | May 2022[cite: 1] |

---

## Work Experience

### Massachusetts General Hospital (Home Base)
**Data Analyst Co-op** | *Boston, MA* | *Jun 2026 – Present*[cite: 1]
*   Build and optimize Tableau dashboards, conduct ad hoc analytics, and design ETL processes[cite: 1].
*   Improve data reliability through rigorous data validation and root-cause analysis of data quality issues[cite: 1].

### Boston University
**Research Assistant (ShieldAI)** | *Boston, MA* | *Jan 2026 – Present*[cite: 1]
*   Leading a collaboration with 3 professors to evaluate over 20 explainable-AI (XAI) and risk mitigation tools against enterprise AI risks[cite: 1].
*   Combining deep literature reviews with hands-on technical testing to drive a scientific manuscript on AI risk management frameworks[cite: 1].

### Standard Chartered Bank
**Data Analyst** | *Singapore* | *Oct 2023 – Apr 2025*[cite: 1]
*   **Generative AI:** Prototyped an internal RAG system using LangChain, FAISS, and Qwen2.5-1.5b to parse 100+ bank annual reports; benchmarked text-splitters via DeepEval, improving top-5 retrieval precision by 35% and cutting analyst review time by 45%[cite: 1].
*   **Data Privacy & Engineering:** Built a Python synthetic data pipeline using Faker from a 10k cross-customer sample to generate 50k+ privacy-compliant records, preventing data leaks and preserving client trust[cite: 1].
*   **Business Intelligence:** Developed an interactive Tableau dashboard segmenting 12K+ loan accounts by behavior, surfacing trend alerts for relationship managers and cutting underutilized exposure by 20%[cite: 1].
*   **Mentorship:** Onboarded, coached, and mentored an accelerated intern whose final executive project presentation ranked in the top 5%, resulting in a full-time offer[cite: 1].

**Digital Channels and Data Analytics Graduate** | *Singapore* | *Sep 2022 – Oct 2023*[cite: 1]
*   **Predictive Modeling:** Prototyped an XGBoost cash-balance forecasting model (14% MAPE) for a treasurer-facing dashboard, enabling significant working capital optimization per platinum client by reducing idle cash buffers[cite: 1].
*   **Product Analytics:** Analyzed Google Analytics event-level data using funnel analysis to quantify user drop-offs, informing UX changes that improved user journey completion by 48%[cite: 1].
*   **Natural Language Processing:** Engineered an NLP solution (n-grams, frequency analysis) on 10K+ mobile banking feedback records to isolate pain points, prioritizing fixes that successfully slashed negative sentiment[cite: 1].

### Biofourmis
**Data Science Intern** | *Singapore* | *Dec 2021 – May 2022*[cite: 1]
*   Led a Bland-Altman statistical analysis of physiological time-series data from 100k+ patients, validating clinical-grade consistency between wearable sensors and clinical reference signals[cite: 1].
*   Engineered and adapted a PyTorch CNN trained on 2-second ECG chunks from 105 signals across 290 patients to predict waveform indices for real-time irregular arrhythmia detection[cite: 1].

---

## Featured Projects

### Section-Scoped RAG System for SEC 10-K Filings
*Jan 2026 – May 2026*[cite: 1]
*   Built an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline optimized for parsing financial documents using FAISS, LangChain, RAGAS, and the OpenAI API[cite: 1].
*   Leveraged advanced NLP, transformer embeddings, and semantic search to programmatically extract AI strategies and risk insights from 7,700+ financial reports across 725 companies[cite: 1].

### Smart Home IoT Data Science Pipeline
*Sep 2025 – Dec 2025*[cite: 1]
*   Developed a predictive machine learning pipeline with SQL-based feature engineering targeted at device-failure prediction[cite: 1].
*   Optimized classification models via stratified cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning (achieving a peak AUC-ROC of 0.82) and deployed an interactive Plotly dashboard to display operational insights[cite: 1].
